title: glechoma laevigata
intro: Glechoma laevigata, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, Glechoma laevigata has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Glechoma laevigata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and help to reduce stress and anxiety. Glechoma laevigata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
